title: Simple Katanas
description: Simple Katanas is a Fabric mod that adds 6 Katanas with timing-based combat to Minecraft, featuring functional parrying and polished visual and audio feedback.
body:
# Simple Katanas

A Fabric mod that adds timing-based katana combat to Minecraft, featuring parries, perfect parry windows, visual feedback, custom sounds, and balanced, skill-focused gameplay.

Features:
### - Six different katanas 

Wood, stone, gold, iron, diamond and netherite
### - Custom crafting recipes

Each version has a recipe, including the netherite upgrade in the smithing table

### - Enchantable


### - Timing-based parry 


### - Visual parry window HUD 


### - Custom sounds & particles 

 
### - Tiered katanas (wood, stone, iron, etc) 


### - Balanced, skill-focused combat


    
![Parry](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0999a0cdd1fa7ddb759243d38eda94f9712a0b6.gif)



Requirements

    Minecraft 1.21.1
    Fabric Loader
    Fabric API
